title: Real X Cobblemon
description: A pokemon vanilla enchanced modpacks that impliments game line gimmicks
body:
REAL X COBBLEMON strive and provides cobblemon additions to make a vanilla esque gameplay. With time and research the modpack has implimented gimmicks such as shiny hunting, breeding, npcs and mega evolution to make the adventure more multiplayer compatible.

-Speaking of multiplayer compatibility the modpack has made it easier to play with fellow friends with the use of the essentials mod.

With the use of npc players can now have a challenging expiernce battling trainers.

And lastly with the improvement of mods that curate users experience with cobblemon in hand, this modpack will also be expected to continuously recieve updates.
